Imports

derep

Types

LearnErrorsBatchResult = object
  matrix*: LearnErrorsResult
  filesRequested*: int
  filesUsed*: int
  readsUsed*: int64
  basesUsed*: int64
  uniqueCountSum*: int
  selfConsistEnabled*: bool
  iterationsRun*: int
  converged*: bool
  maxAbsProbDelta*: float64
  centerChangesTotal*: int
LearnErrorsOptions = object
  qMin*: int
  qMax*: int
  pseudocount*: float64
  zeroTotalMismatchProb*: float64
LearnErrorsResult = object
  qMin*: int
  qMax*: int
  counts*: array[16, seq[int64]]
  probs*: array[16, seq[float64]]
  totalTransitions*: int64
  skippedPositions*: int64
  centerCountByLength*: int
LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions = object
  enabled*: bool
  minIterations*: int
  maxIterations*: int
  tol*: float64
  maxCentersPerLength*: int
LearnErrorsSelfConsistResult = object
  matrix*: LearnErrorsResult
  iterationsRun*: int
  converged*: bool
  maxAbsProbDelta*: float64
  centerChangesTotal*: int
  centersByLength*: seq[tuple[seqLen: int, center: string]]

Consts

DnaBases = ['A', 'C', 'G', 'T']

proc baseIndex(c: char): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc defaultLearnErrorsOptions(): LearnErrorsOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc defaultLearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions(): LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc derepBaseCount(derepRes: DerepFastqResult): int64 {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: LearnErrorsOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getCount(res: LearnErrorsResult; fromBase, toBase: char; q: int): int64 {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getProb(res: LearnErrorsResult; fromBase, toBase: char; q: int): float64 {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc learnErrorsFromDerep(derepRes: DerepFastqResult; opts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions()): LearnErrorsResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc learnErrorsFromDereps(derepResults: openArray[DerepFastqResult]; opts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions()): LearnErrorsResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc learnErrorsFromFastqPaths(inputPaths: openArray[string]; derepOpts: DerepFastqOptions = defaultDerepFastqOptions();
    learnOpts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions();
                               nbases: int64 = 100000000; selfConsistOpts: LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions = defaultLearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions()): LearnErrorsBatchResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc learnErrorsSelfConsistentFromDereps(
    derepResults: openArray[DerepFastqResult];
    learnOpts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions(); scOpts: LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions = defaultLearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions()): LearnErrorsSelfConsistResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc readLearnErrorsTsv(path: string): LearnErrorsResult {.
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError, ValueError, Exception],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
proc transitionIndex(fromBase, toBase: char): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: LearnErrorsOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: LearnErrorsSelfConsistOptions) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc writeLearnErrorsCountsTsv(path: string; res: LearnErrorsResult) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc writeLearnErrorsTsv(path: string; res: LearnErrorsResult) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
